## TDD Proof

- [ ] Failing test(s) were written first.
- [ ] I captured why the test failed initially.
- [ ] I added the minimal implementation needed to make the test pass.
- [ ] I ran the targeted test command below.
- [ ] I ran the owning-folder suite when it existed, otherwise the closest relevant suite or full suite command below.
- [ ] I ran broader repo checks when the change crossed multiple areas or needed extra confidence, or I explained why they were not needed.

### Evidence

- Failing test proof:
- Why it failed:
- Minimal implementation:
- Targeted test command:
- Owning-folder suite, closest relevant suite, or full suite command:
- Broader repo checks run, or why not needed:

## Review Notes

- Risky folders touched:
- New mocks introduced:
- Follow-up tests intentionally deferred:
- Other review notes:
